reviews.comment:
Que mal atendida que esta esta estacion de servicio!!! Todos los años que pasaes la misma historia. Los sobreprecios de las cosas don ridiculos. Es insolito estar en un punto de acceso al pais y que esa sea la impresion. Ojala que cambien.

(Translated by Google)
This gas station is terrible! Every year it's the same story. The prices are ridiculous. It's unbelievable to be at a gateway to the country and get this impression. I hope things change.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/9304894923443142675/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnTUNvLWRPUV9RRRAB

reviews.comment:
PESIMO !
Un montón de surtidores, varios playeros y uno solo atendiendo y MAL.
Que bueno seria que la marca sea una empresa de verdad y que al verificar la HORRIBLE  ATENCION,  les quiten la concesión y a los desastrosos empleados, sin trabajo.
Seguramente van a responder : " tendremos en cuenta tu opinión, estamos trabajando para una mejor atención "...
DESASTRE SON !

(Translated by Google)
TERRIBLE!
A ton of pumps, several attendants, and only one working, and he's BAD.
It would be great if this brand were a real company and, after verifying the HORRID SERVICE, they revoked their concession and fired the disastrous employees.
They'll probably respond: "We'll take your opinion into account; we're working on improving service"... THEY'RE A DISASTER!
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/9304894923443142675/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnTUNvOXZmUmJREAE

reviews.comment:
Muy sucios los baños. La mitad de los baños clausurado. No me trataron bien

(Translated by Google)
The bathrooms were filthy. Half of them were closed. I wasn't treated well.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/9304894923443142675/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnTUNvMk9IQ3VnRRAB
